description: Mandatory structure for Clinical Study Protocol per ICH E6(R3) and CDSCO requirements

sections.regulatory_requirements: Must include all ICH E6 synopsis elements. Should be standalone summary of 2-3 pages maximum.
sections.special_instructions: Use present tense for study design, future tense for planned activities. Include key eligibility criteria summary.

sections.regulatory_requirements: Clearly state primary and secondary objectives. Must align with endpoints in Section 6.
sections.special_instructions: Use specific, measurable language. Avoid vague terms like 'evaluate' without specifying what will be measured.

sections.regulatory_requirements: Per ICH E6 Section 6.1. Must include clear description of design type, blinding, randomization ratio, and study phases.
sections.special_instructions: Include a study flow diagram placeholder: [STUDY DIAGRAM TO BE INSERTED]. Specify washout periods for crossover designs.

sections.regulatory_requirements: Per ICH E6 Section 4.1. Must be specific and measurable. Include all safety-related exclusions.
sections.special_instructions: Number each criterion. Include age ranges, diagnostic criteria, washout requirements, and prohibited medications.

sections.regulatory_requirements: Per ICH E6 Section 4.2. Must specify exact dosing regimen, route, frequency, and duration.
sections.special_instructions: Include IMP formulation details. Specify allowed and prohibited concomitant medications.

sections.regulatory_requirements: Must align with objectives in Section 2. Specify validated assessment tools and timing.
sections.special_instructions: Reference validated scales (e.g., RECIST 1.1, CTCAE v5.0). Include assessment windows.

sections.regulatory_requirements: Per NDCTR 2019 Rule 16. Must specify SAE reporting timelines (14 days for India). Include DSMB details if applicable.
sections.special_instructions: Use CTCAE v5.0 for AE grading. Specify causality assessment method (WHO-UMC scale).

sections.regulatory_requirements: Per ICH E9. Must specify alpha level (typically 0.05 two-sided), power (typically 80-90%), and analysis populations (ITT, PP, Safety).
sections.special_instructions: For BE studies: state acceptance criteria (80.00-125.00% per CDSCO 2018). Include multiplicity adjustment methods if applicable.

sections.regulatory_requirements: Per ICH E6 Section 5.5. Must specify eCRF system, data validation procedures, and retention period (minimum 3 years per NDCTR 2019).
sections.special_instructions: Specify EDC system name. Include ALCOA+ principles reference.

sections.regulatory_requirements: Per NDCTR 2019 Rule 7 and ICH E6 Section 3. Must specify EC name and reference number. Include CTRI registration number.
sections.special_instructions: Reference ICH E6(R3) consent requirements. Include statement on vulnerable populations if applicable.

sections.regulatory_requirements: Per NDCTR 2019 Rule 11. Must specify insurance coverage details and compensation for injury.
sections.special_instructions: Include insurance policy number and coverage amount. Specify compensation mechanism.

sections.regulatory_requirements: Per ICMJE guidelines. Must specify authorship criteria and publication timeline.
sections.special_instructions: Reference CTRI results submission requirement (within 1 year of study completion).
